searchUrls.title: Search URLs
searchUrls.description: Direct arabam.com search or category result page URLs. Use this or filters, not both.

listingUrls.title: Listing URLs
listingUrls.description: Direct arabam.com vehicle detail page URLs to scrape. Can be combined with other inputs.

filters.title: Search Filters
filters.description: Build a search URL from filters when searchUrls is not provided.

make.title: Make
make.description: Vehicle make or brand in slug form, for example 'volkswagen', 'toyota', or 'bmw'.

model.title: Model
model.description: Vehicle model in slug form, for example 'passat' or 'corolla'.

yearMin.title: Minimum Year
yearMin.description: Optional. Minimum model year to include in the search.

yearMax.title: Maximum Year
yearMax.description: Optional. Maximum model year to include in the search.

priceMin.title: Minimum Price (TRY)
priceMin.description: Optional. Minimum asking price in Turkish lira.

priceMax.title: Maximum Price (TRY)
priceMax.description: Optional. Maximum asking price in Turkish lira.

city.title: City
city.description: Optional. Filter by city, for example 'istanbul', 'ankara', or 'izmir'.

maxListings.title: Maximum Listings
maxListings.description: Maximum number of vehicle listings to scrape, from 1 to 10000.

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape Detail Pages
scrapeDetails.description: When enabled, visits each listing detail page for complete specs, paint condition, accident history, and seller contact details. Disable for faster card-only scraping.

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Proxy settings. Turkish residential proxies are strongly recommended for reliability.
